props.videoInjection: try{window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify( ({ imageHeaders: { 'Referer': 'https://www.pornhub.org/' }, headers: { 'Referer': 'https://www.pornhub.org/' }, links: [{ name: document.querySelectorAll('.userBoxWrapper a')[1].textContent, link: document.querySelectorAll('.userBoxWrapper a')[1].href, channel: !!document.querySelector("a[data-label='channel']"), star: !document.querySelector("a[data-label='channel']"), img: document.querySelectorAll('.userBoxWrapper a')[0].firstElementChild.src }, ...[...document.querySelectorAll("a[data-label='pornstar']")].map((a)=>({ link: a.href, name: a.textContent.trim(), star: true, img: a.firstElementChild.src })), ...[...document.querySelectorAll('a.item')].map((a)=>({ link: a.href, name: a.textContent })) ], url: Object.fromEntries(window[Object.keys(window).find(k => k.startsWith('flashvars_'))].mediaDefinitions.filter((i)=>i.format==='hls').map((i)=>([ i.quality+'p', i.videoUrl ]))),likes:document.querySelector('#thumbs-up > span').textContent.trim(),views: document.querySelector('li.views > span').textContent,recommendedVideos: [...document.querySelectorAll('li[data-video-id] a[data-video-id]')].map((i)=>({ title: i.querySelector('img').alt, src: i.href, duration: i.parentElement.querySelector('span.bgEffect.time').textContent, thumbnailUrl: i.querySelector('img').src, preview: i.getAttribute('data-webm') })).slice(0,15), ready: true }) ))}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify({ error: e.message }));}
props.injection: if(document.querySelectorAll("button.gtm-event-age-verification")[1]) document.querySelectorAll("button.gtm-event-age-verification")[1].click();try{window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify(  { links: [...document.querySelectorAll(".trendingNow[type='button'] > a")].map((e)=>({ src: e.href, name: e.textContent.trim(), star: e.href.includes("/pornstar/") || e.href.includes("/model/"), search: e.href.includes("/search")})), list: [...document.querySelectorAll("li[data-video-id] a[data-video-id]")].map((i)=>({ title: i.querySelector("img").alt, src: i.href, duration: i.parentElement.querySelector("span.bgEffect.time").textContent, thumbnailUrl: i.querySelector("img").src, preview: i.getAttribute("data-webm") })).slice(0,30) }  ))}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage( JSON.stringify( {error: e.message} ));}

try{ if(document.querySelectorAll('button.gtm-event-age-verification')[1]) document.querySelectorAll('button.gtm-event-age-verification')[1].click();fetch('https://www.pornhub.org/api/v1/video/search_autocomplete?'+document.querySelector('#search_text')?.getAttribute('data-autocomplete')+'&q='+new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('search')+'&pornstars=true').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{ window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify( [['Videos', data.queries?.map((q)=>({ title: q })) || data.popularSearches.slice(0,15).map((s)=>({ title: s }))], ['Channels', data.channels?.map((p)=>({ title: p.name, src: 'https://www.pornhub.org/channels/'+p.slug })) ], ['Pornstars', data.pornstars?.map((p)=>({ title: p.name, src: 'https://www.pornhub.org/pornstar/'+p.slug }))], ['Models', data.models?.map((p)=>({ title: p.name, src: 'https://www.pornhub.org/model/'+p.slug })) ] ] ))    }); } catch(e) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify( { error: 'Injection Error', message: e.message } )) }
